---
  title: "Cuisines MCA Analysis"
  author: "Omar Lizardo"
  date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

# Setup
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
    knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
    library(conflicted)
    library(here)
    library(dplyr)
    library(tidyr)
    library(ggplot2)
    library(sjPlot)
    library(haven)
    library(patchwork)
    library(factoextra)
    library(FactoMineR)
    library(ggrepel)
    library(patchwork)
    library(stringr)
    library(corrplot)
    conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
    conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select)
    conflicts_prefer(dplyr::summarize)
```

```{r Getting and Recoding Data}
    source(here("recode.dat.R"))
    dat <- recode.dat() |> 
        select(
            fancy_restaurant:fast_food,
            light:avocado, 
            japanese.f:lebanese.f,
            -ends_with("count"),
            c(age, income, educ, peduc, arts, city, relig), 
            c(race.f, sex.f, gend.f, pol.f)
            ) |> 
        na.omit() |> 
        relocate(authentic, .before = caviar) |> 
        relocate(familiar, .before = caviar) |> 
        relocate(big, .before = caviar) |> 
        relocate(small, .before = caviar) 
    names(dat)
```

```{r Multiple Factor Analysis}
    mfa.res <- MFA(dat, 
        group = c(2, 6, 6, 15, 7, 4), 
        type = c("c", "c", "c", "n", "c", "n"),
        name.group = c("dine_out", "food_qual", "food", "authenticity", "quant.sup", "quali.sup"), 
        graph = FALSE,
        num.group.sup = (5:6)
        )
    mfa.dat <- dat |> cbind(mfa.res$ind$coord)
```

```{r}
    cat.dat <- mfa.res$quali.var$coord |> 
        data.frame() |> 
        select(c(1,3))
    names(cat.dat) <- c("Dim.1", "Dim.2")
    contrib <- rowSums(cat.dat)
    contrib <- contrib/max(contrib)
    p <- ggplot(cat.dat, aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, label = rownames(cat.dat)))
    p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "gray", linewidth = 1)
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray", linewidth = 1)
    p <- p + geom_text_repel(
        size = 7, 
        max.overlaps = 30, 
        fontface = "bold", 
        alpha = 1
        )
    p + theme_minimal() + theme(text = element_text(size = 16))
```

```{r Eigenvalue Plot}
    d <- 10
    p <- fviz_eig(mfa.res, choice = "eigenvalue", ncp =d)
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 2, color = "red", linewidth = 1)
    p <- p + theme(text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
    p + geom_text(label = paste0(round(mfa.res$eig[, 2], 1),"%")[1:d], vjust=-1.1, hjust = 0.3,size = 5) + ylim(0, 1.75)  + ggtitle("")
    save_plot(here("Plots", "eig.png"), height = 25, width = 20)
```

```{r}
    plot.mat <- get_mfa_var(mfa.res)$cor
    plot.mat <- plot.mat %>%
        as_tibble() |> 
        pivot_longer(
            cols = colnames(plot.mat), # Columns to gather
            names_to = "Dimension",     # New column for original column names
            values_to = "Correlation"          # New column for the values
        ) |> 
        mutate(Variable = rep(rownames(plot.mat), each = 5)) |> 
        mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, levels = rownames(plot.mat)))  #|> 
        #filter(Dimension != "Dim.4" & Dimension != "Dim.5")
    a <- 0.75
    b <- -0.62
    ggplot(plot.mat, aes(y = Variable, x = Dimension, fill = Correlation)) + 
        geom_tile(color = "white", lwd = 2, linetype = 1) + coord_fixed() +
        scale_fill_gradient2(
                    low = "darkred",
                    mid = "#FFFFCC",
                    high = "darkblue",
                    midpoint = 0, limit = c(a,b)) +
        geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", Correlation)), 
                    vjust = 0.6, 
                    fontface = "bold", 
                    color = "white", size = 10) +
        scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
        scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            axis.title = element_blank(),
            text = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
            legend.position = "right",
            legend.title = element_blank(),
            legend.key.height = unit(3, "cm"),  
        ) 
    save_plot(here("Plots", "varcor.png"), height = 60, width = 40) 
```

```{r Regression Models}
    ind.vars <- c("Intercept", "Asian", "Black", "Hispanic", "Mixed Race (Other)", "Mixed Race (White)", "Woman", "Nonbinary/Other", "LGBTQ", "Education", "Parent's Educ.", "Child Arts Exp.", "Age", "Income", "City Size", "Conservative", "Liberal", "Religious Attendance")
    spec1 <- c("race.f", "gend.f" ,"sex.f", "educ", "peduc", "arts", "age", "income", "city", "pol.f", "relig")
    f1 <- as.formula(paste("Dim.1 ~", paste(spec1, collapse = " + ")))
    f2 <- as.formula(paste("Dim.2 ~", paste(spec1, collapse = " + ")))
    f3 <- as.formula(paste("Dim.3 ~", paste(spec1, collapse = " + ")))
    m1 <- glm(f1, family = "gaussian", data = mfa.dat)
    m2 <- glm(f2, family = "gaussian", data = mfa.dat)
    m3 <- glm(f3, family = "gaussian", data = mfa.dat)
    tab_model(m1, m2, m3,
            file = here("Tabs", "pca-reg-tab1.html"), 
            dv.labels = c("Fancy Taste <br> (Dim. 1)", 
                          "Common Taste <br> (Dim. 2)",
                          "Foodie Taste <br> (Dim. 1)"
                        ), 
            CSS = list(css.table = 'font-size: 12px;', css.td = 'border-bottom: 0px;'), 
            show.ci = FALSE,  show.se = TRUE, collapse.se = TRUE, p.style = "numeric_stars", show.std = "std2", show.est = FALSE, digits = 3,
            pred.labels = ind.vars,
            title = "Table 1. Coefficient estimates of generalized linear models predicting scores on the first three MFA dimensions."
            )
```
